objective: Extend the existing Actions-first adapter so a scope-valid executor candidate patch is hash-bound and uploaded before the trusted required check, including when that check fails, and a later immutable task can optionally bind and safely apply exactly one same-repository failed-candidate seed before bounded correction. Keep clean exact-main checkout, fail-closed verification, actor lineage, no credentials during seed validation/application, and no success/publication implication from the seed. Do not build an orchestrator service. Claude Code OAuth only; no API billing.

problem_evidence.near_candidate_result: 316 of 317 B3 tests passed but failed artifact omitted reusable patch
problem_evidence.regenerated_result: fresh clean-main generation regressed to 10 B3 failures
problem_evidence.conclusion: preserve failed candidate evidence and seed corrections; do not repeat prompt generation from scratch

architecture_boundary.implementation_surface: existing p0-actions-adapter workflow and helper only

field_constraints.task_path: existing allowlisted immutable task path shape
field_constraints.changed_paths: non-empty unique repository-relative path array using existing safe path rules

relations: seed.repository equals current task.repository and github.repository
every seed.changed_paths entry is within the current task allowed paths and outside denied paths

failed_candidate_capture.phase: after real executor/session/tool-policy and changed-path scope validation, before registered required check
failed_candidate_capture.patch: exact git binary diff from immutable base to complete executor workspace, excluding p0-adapter-output
failed_candidate_capture.artifact: existing p0-adapter-output artifact uploaded with if: always
bindings: base/task/run/attempt/execution/adapter come from trusted workflow observations and real transcript
changed_paths equal independently observed staged diff paths
on_required_check_failure: candidate.patch and candidate-evidence.json remain evidence only
publisher is skipped and no branch/commit is published

seed_retrieval.workflow_permission: execute job may add actions: read; contents stays read
seed_retrieval.download_tool: pinned actions/download-artifact v4 with github.token and exact run-id
seed_retrieval.missing_or_expired_artifact: terminal fail closed before provider invocation

seed_validation_and_application.start_state: clean detached/current target branch created at exact protected-main base
seed_validation_and_application.path_policy: all patch paths exactly equal seed.changed_paths, are within current allowed paths and outside denied paths
forbid: binary patch unless explicitly proven safe
seed_validation_and_application.apply_check: git apply --check against exact base before application
seed_validation_and_application.apply: apply without network, contents write token, provider OAuth secret or GitHub API credential
post_apply: re-observe exact changed paths and file modes
record seed binding in executor manifest
invoke current executor only after every validation passes

lineage.final_candidate_authored_commits: still exactly one publisher-owned commit; executor lineage is evidence metadata, not invented Git authorship

normal_execution_compatibility.tasks_without_correction_seed: byte-for-byte-equivalent control flow until new pre-check candidate capture
normal_execution_compatibility.existing_result_patch: created only after successful required check as today

failure_normalization.every new manifest code: must be present in MANIFEST_FAILURE_NORMALIZATION, FAILURE_TERMINAL_REASON and FAILURE_PREDICATE
failure_normalization.terminal_semantics: missing artifact maps to missing_artifact; binding/digest/apply mismatch maps to ref_history_unverifiable or identity/binding predicate; scope/unsafe path maps to scope_violation

required_tests: task schema accepts absent/null/valid correction_seed and rejects each malformed field
candidate patch is emitted before required check and retained on required_check_failed
failure patch never becomes result.patch or postconditions_passed
exact run-id artifact download uses actions:read and current github.token
missing artifact stops before provider invocation
evidence field, run, task, base, execution and digest mismatches fail closed
changed-path mismatch and denied/out-of-scope seed fail closed
git apply check failure fails closed
valid seed applies before provider and its exact binding enters manifest
required check is rerun after seed plus correction
all new failure codes normalize to truthful stable terminal reasons
existing verification-only and no-seed tests stay green
